query: 2026 Venezuela earthquakes June 24 confirmed death toll latest figures, trajectory of confirmed deaths reported by authorities and Wikipedia, number of missing persons and rescue operation status
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on the June 24, 2026 Venezuela earthquakes:

**Death toll trajectory (steadily rising):**
- ~188 → ~235 (June 25) → 1,719 (June 29, UN) → 2,295 (July 1, day 7) → **2,595 (July 3, latest authority figure)**
- **Wikipedia** currently states "more than 2,590 killed, over 12,500 injured" — closely tracking the latest official count of 2,595 deaths / 12,400 injured.

**Missing persons:** Nearly **50,000 unaccounted for** (ABC News, July 3); Wikipedia describes "tens of thousands missing."

**Rescue status:** Still **ongoing** as of July 3 — one survivor pulled out after 183 hours. Over 2,000 workers from 27 countries + 160 dogs deployed, amid 862+ aftershocks and threatening rainfall.

**Key context:** USGS PAGER modeled a potential 10,000–100,000 death range, signaling the confirmed count remains an undercount with an upward trajectory. It was Venezuela's strongest quake since 1900.

Full structured findings (key facts, sources, and 16 data points) have been submitted via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: 2026 Venezuela earthquakes - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: More than 2,590 people were killed, over 12,500 were injured, and tens of thousands were reported missing. USGS PAGER predicted the death toll could exceed 10,000.

sources.title: Venezuela earthquakes latest: Death toll climbs as rescuers continue searching - ABC News
sources.snippet: At least 2,595 have died and 12,400 injured; nearly 50,000 people remain unaccounted for; 862+ aftershocks; search and rescue continuing.

sources.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll passes 1,700 as UN continues to scale up response - UN News
sources.snippet: Authorities confirmed at least 1,719 dead (June 29). Over 2,000 rescue workers from 27 countries, 160+ dogs; ~500 aftershocks; 10,000 body bags to be procured.

sources.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll rises above 2,200 as rescue efforts continue (Miami Herald)
sources.snippet: Day seven (July 1): official death toll 2,295, 11,267 injured; missing-persons crisis intensifying.

sources.title: Venezuela Earthquake Update: Magnitude 7.5 and 7.2 Quakes, Latest Figures - Miyamoto International
sources.snippet: Updated July 1-2, 2026: ~2,295 deaths, 11,200+ injured; ~$6.7 billion estimated damage; survivor rescued after 183 hours.

sources.title: June 24-25, 2026 - Venezuela rocked by 7.5 and 7.2 magnitude earthquakes - CNN
sources.snippet: Death toll rose to around 235, 4,300 injured according to health minister; 200+ trapped in Caracas.

sources.title: Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 188 people, injure 1,520 - Al Jazeera
sources.snippet: Initial toll: at least 188 killed, 1,520 injured; USGS says casualties could range 10,000-100,000.

sources.title: Venezuela Earthquakes: Children Need Help Now - UNICEF USA
sources.snippet: UNICEF estimates 1.8 million people, including 680,000 children, need humanitarian assistance.
